text:
Once upon a time, in a land far, far away, there lived a curious cat named Whiskers. Whiskers loved exploring the forest behind his cozy little cottage. On a sunny day, he spotted a peculiar bird perched on an ancient oak tree. The bird had wings like saffron balloons and sang a song that sounded like a melodic lullaby.

Curious, Whiskers edged closer. As he approached, the bird fluttered its wings and sang, "Tell me all about your adventures."

Whiskers thought for a moment. "Sometimes I catch fish with my paws," he said. "But my real passion is collecting bird feathers. I think they're beautiful."

The songbird swooped down and plucked a beautiful feather from its own wing. "Here," it chirped. "Take this as a gift."

Whiskers caught the feather between his paws and bowed. "Thank you so much," he murmured.

Every day
